name: ENB Financial Corp
business: The basic business of the Corporation is to provide a broad range of financial services to individuals and small-to-medium-sized businesses in the Market Area primarily through the Bank. The Bank is a full-service commercial bank organized under the laws of the United States. The Bank has one subsidiary, ENB Insurance, which is a full-service insurance agency that offers a broad range of insurance products to commercial and personal clients.

exposures.sentence: The Bank has one subsidiary, ENB Insurance, which is a full-service insurance agency that offers a broad range of insurance products to commercial and personal clients.
The residential real estate category represents the largest group of loans for the Corporation.
The Corporation is exposed to the risk of cyber-attacks in the normal course of business.

The Corporation incorporates AI solutions into platforms that deliver products and services to our customers, including solutions developed by third parties whose AI is integrated into our products and services.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Cecil Bancorp, Inc. completed
catalysts.sentence: Effective February 1, 2026, the Corporation completed its previously-announced acquisition of Cecil Bancorp, Inc.

Occupancy expenses increased $273,000, or 8.2% for the year ended December 31, 2025 compared to 2024 due to inflationary pressures combined with the opening of the downtown Lititz branch in June 2025.
the Corporation issued $42,500,000 of debentures in December 2025, with higher rates than the first two issuances.
In January 2026, $20,000,000 subordinated debt, representing the entire 2020 first issuance, was redeemed at par with proceeds raised from the 2025 subordinated debt issuance.
